description: Protective hooks that block editing sensitive files and lint shell scripts

hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*|*/.env|*secrets*|*.local) echo "BLOCK: Cannot edit environment/secret files: $FILE_PATH" >&2; exit 2;; esac

FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in */Generated/*|*/obj/*|*/bin/*|*/dist/*|*/build/*) echo "BLOCK: Cannot edit generated/build output files: $FILE_PATH" >&2; exit 2;; esac

FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in */yarn.lock|*/package-lock.json|*/packages.lock.json|*/pnpm-lock.yaml|*/Cargo.lock|*/go.sum|*/poetry.lock) echo "BLOCK: Cannot edit lock files: $FILE_PATH" >&2; exit 2;; esac

FILE_PATH=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$FILE_PATH" ] && exit 0; case "$FILE_PATH" in *.sh) command -v shellcheck >/dev/null 2>&1 && { shellcheck --severity=warning "$FILE_PATH" 2>&1 | head -20 || true; } || true;; esac
